name: Grilled Japanese Eggplants
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped fresh herbs (e.g., basil, oregano, thyme)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------BALSAMIC DRESSING-----------------------------
1. In a shallow pan, combine balsamic vinegar and olive oil.
Add salt and white pepper to taste.
2. Place the Japanese eggplants, split side down, in the marinade.
Turn several times to coat well and let marinate for 20 minutes.
3. Grill the eggplants, split side down, over medium coals until done.
4. Remove charred portions of skin from roasted peppers by placing them
in a plastic bag until cool enough to handle, then under cold running water.
5. Cut the peppers into eighths and discard seeds.
6. Press fresh herbs onto goat cheese medallions.
7. Heat the goat cheese at 350°F for 3 minutes until warmed.
8. Toss walnut pieces with brown sugar, cayenne pepper, and a dash of salt.
9. Arrange 4 eggplant halves on each of 8 plates.
10. Place 2 strips of red and green peppers between the eggplant halves.
11. Set 2 cheese medallions beside the peppers.
12. Sprinkle sauteed walnuts over the top.
13. To make the dressing, combine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and pepper to taste.
14. Drizzle the dressing over the salad.
